name: Spinach & Garbanzos & Raisins Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook garlic in oil over medium heat until golden.
2. Over high heat, stir in spinach, garbanzo beans, golden raisins, salt, and red pepper.
3. Cook until the spinach wilts.
4. Stir in chicken broth.
5. Add the penne or other pasta to the sauce and cook according to package instructions until al dente.
